title: Yavin (disambiguation)
content:
'''Yavin''' might refer to:

==Canon==
*The [[Yavin Code]], a code dictating the treatment of prisoners.
*The [[Yavin Convention]], the convention that established the Yavin Code.
*The [[Yavin system]]
*The planet [[Yavin Prime]]
**The moon [[Yavin 4]]

==Legends==
*The [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]]
*The star [[Yavin/Legends|Yavin]]
*The gas giant planet [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin Prime]]
**The moon [[Yavin 1]]
**The moon [[Yavin 2]]
**The moon [[Yavin 3]]
**The moon [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], which was the site of numerous historical events
**The moon [[Yavin 7]]
**The moon [[Yavin 8/Legends|Yavin 8]]
**The moon [[Yavin 13/Legends|Yavin 13]]
**The moon [[Yavin 22]]
*[[Yavin (deity)|Yavin]] was also the god of the [[Massassi/Legends|Massassi]] represented by the gas giant.
*[[Yavin (starship)]]
{{Disambig}}

|fi=Yavin (täsmennyssivu)
|ja=ヤヴィン（曖昧さ回避）
}}
